name: URL Encoder / Decoder
description: Encode or decode URLs online. Convert special characters to URL-safe format and vice versa.
keywords: url encoder, url decoder, percent encoding, encode url online, decode url, url escape
howToUse: 1. Paste text/URL 2. Choose Encode or Decode 3. See result instantly 4. Copy output
faq: Q: What is URL encoding? A: Converts special chars to % format. Q: When to use? A: API calls, query strings.
